feed.description: Mountain biking talk: trails, technique, gear, and the people who build the ride.
feed.title: Singletrack Sessions

bullets: Welcome back to Singletrack Sessions. Today we're talking about enduro racing, and I'm joined by Sophie Lorenz, enduro racer and coach. Sophie Lorenz, thanks for being here.
Before we get into it — Liam Verbeck was on the show talking about how drainage is the single highest-leverage design choice.
Yeah, exactly. And it ties into what we're covering today.
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Singletrack Sessions. Today we're talking about enduro racing, and I'm joined by Sophie Lorenz, enduro racer and coach. Sophie Lorenz, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Enduro Skills Without the Hype
